last_mile_review.skip_reason: Last-mile two-stage adversarial review skipped on user directive (2026-05-04). Environment lacks node binary required by ollama-companion.mjs and codex-companion.mjs; user authorized 'assume node will be available, proceed.' All 9 pre-impl + 9 post-impl verification questions PASS, make check green at 86.00% coverage with 1044 tests, AC-024/025 traceability sound.

summary: Documentation pass. Added the 'Choosing a harness' section to docs/configuration.md (with dispatcher matrix, .clauded.yaml example with harness/frameworks/versions.opencode, mode-flag interaction matrix, and harness ⇒ framework troubleshooting). Refreshed the configuration.md frameworks reference to include codex and opencode and removed the stale USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 reference. Added a 'Choosing a harness' subsection + opencode/codex rows in README.md and updated the configuration example with `harness:`. Updated specs/spec.md (high-level only per project CLAUDE.md) with the harness field, --harness flag, role selection, and harness ⇒ framework validation rule. Added CHANGELOG.md Story 06 Changed entry for the doc refresh; left earlier stories' [Unreleased] entries intact and verified bucketing. Added tests/test_documentation.py (9 grep-based audit tests) to mechanically lock in AC-025 plus the boy-scout no-RIPGREP-in-docs invariant and a verification-plan-step-4 negative grep for opencode-alpine in src/. AC-024 (make check + coverage ≥80%) and AC-025 (docs grep audit) both green.

changes: Updated Workspace Mounting feature bullet to mention opencode mounts when in frameworks.
Added codex and opencode rows to the Frameworks & Tools table.
Added 'Choosing a harness' subsection right after the table with three example invocations and a link to docs/configuration.md#choosing-a-harness.
Added `harness: claude-code` line to the Configuration example YAML.
wizard.py module-responsibilities: added opencode to frameworks multi-select; added a bullet for the harness selection step.
Config Schema YAML illustration: added `harness:` top-level field and `opencode` framework + `versions:` block (claude-code/codex/opencode pin slots).
New 'Harness Selection' paragraph in Configuration Management explaining allowed values, default, save behaviour (FR3), and the harness ⇒ framework rule (FR4).
Configuration Validation: new bullet listing harness validation rules (allowed values, FR4 cross-field rule, INV-3 always-pass for claude-code/codex).
Role Selection Logic: added opencode bullet (Ubuntu only, NFR5).
Auto-bundled Roles: noted opencode is a static binary with no Node.js dependency.
CLI Interface Options: added --harness <claude-code|codex|opencode> with full mode-flag interaction matrix and exit codes.

environment.frameworks: extended Allowed Values to include codex and opencode; added codex and opencode entries to the Available Frameworks list with installation, command, use cases, and harness-selection note; opencode entry mentions Ubuntu-only and the host-mounted state directories.
claude-code framework entry: removed the stale 'USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0' bullet from Alpine deps (Story 04 boy-scout follow-through).

New 'Choosing a harness' top-level section between 'Claude Code Permissions' and 'Minimal Configuration' with an example .clauded.yaml snippet, the dispatcher matrix (claude-code/codex/opencode → command + permission flag), three selection paths (wizard / --harness override / hand-edit), the --harness × mode-flag interaction matrix, and a troubleshooting note for the harness ⇒ framework error pointing at clauded --edit.
[Unreleased] / Changed: appended Story 06 entry documenting the README/spec.md/configuration.md refresh.

files_created.purpose: AC-025 mechanical audit: 9 tests covering substring presence in each user-facing doc (4 parametrized) + USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP absence (3 parametrized) + opencode-alpine absence in src/ (1) + [Unreleased] non-emptiness (1).
files_created.production_code_dependencies: none; reads doc files directly via Path

make_check_result.mypy: Success: no issues found in 22 source files

pytest.delta_vs_baseline: +9 new tests vs Story 06 baseline of 1035; ZERO regressions

boundary_rules_check: Rule 4: satisfied — tests/test_documentation.py asserts properties of the docs themselves; not a test-only adaptation of production code.
Rule 5: n/a — no shared lists touched.
Rule 7: documentation cleanup of the USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP=0 stale reference is in scope for the documentation pass and consistent with Story 04's production-code removal.
implementation_constraints_check: Pre-Alpine-removal targeting: docs reference Alpine where the existing copy did; no new alpine-removal claims.
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased]: Story 06 contributed a single Changed bullet for the doc refresh; no earlier stories' entries were rewritten or removed.
Backward compatibility: docs explicitly note that pre-epic configs without `harness:` continue to load and behave identically (default claude-code).
Each story leaves codebase green: make check exit 0.
out_of_scope_confirmed_excluded: End-to-end VM provisioning validation (Story 07, deferred manual step).
Architecture docs in docs/architecture.md (out of FR12 scope; specs/spec.md is the canonical architecture surface for this epic).
notes_for_verifier: Documentation-only story; tests/test_documentation.py is the new artifact and the AC-025 audit lock-in. Verifier-relevant pointers: README.md frameworks table + new 'Choosing a harness' subsection (around the Frameworks & Tools section); specs/spec.md harness wizard step bullet, harness: schema entry + Harness Selection paragraph, harness validation bullet, opencode role-selection bullet, --harness CLI option entry; docs/configuration.md frameworks reference (codex/opencode entries) + new 'Choosing a harness' section between 'Claude Code Permissions' and 'Minimal Configuration'; CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] / Changed (Story 06 doc-refresh bullet at the bottom of Changed). 1044 tests green; lint/typecheck clean; coverage 86%.
